title: ANC - 3b.-Change ANC from Adaptive to Standard and vice versa during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: ANC mode switching between Adaptive and Standard during a call with Transparency disabled does not restore correct ANC/Transparency states after call ends on Emu/Osprey/Tern vs Lark/Peregrine devices
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
5. Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
7. Initiate or join a call (e.g., via mobile network or VoIP app).
8. During the call, observe that ANC is ON and Transparency is greyed out/OFF (popup may appear: 'Transparency unavailable during call').
9. While still on the call, tap the Transparency toggle to confirm it is disabled (popup appears).
10. While still on the call, navigate to Audio Settings → ANC.
11. Switch ANC mode from Adaptive to Standard.
12. Switch ANC mode back from Standard to Adaptive.
14. After the call ends, navigate to Audio Settings → ANC and note the ANC mode.
15. Navigate to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and note the Transparency state.
16. Repeat steps 1–15 starting with ANC set to Standard and Transparency ON before the call.
expected:
After the call ends, ANC and Transparency states return correctly based on device type:
- For Emu/Osprey/Tern devices: ANC returns to the last selected mode (Adaptive or Standard) and Transparency returns to ON (as set before the call).
- For Lark/Peregrine devices: ANC returns to the last selected mode and Transparency returns to ON (as set before the call).
